payload.message: Add a --json flag so the CLI can emit machine-readable forecasts.

content.text: Added a --json flag to the forecast command. When set, output is a single JSON document with location, units, and an hourly array, and all decorative logging is suppressed so the result is pipe-safe. README and shell completions are updated, and three new CLI tests cover the flag.

payload.last_agent_message: --json flag implemented with tests and docs.
